changelog:
- Feat: WebP `<picture>` serving — frontend auto-serves WebP with fallback via picture_tag()
- Feat: Focal point picker — click to set focus point on images, saved as object-position
- Feat: Bulk delete in media library — checkbox per image + "Radera valda" toolbar
- Feat: SEO score per post — 0-100 score with color badge in post list + detail panel in editor
- Feat: Sitemap ping — auto-pings Google on publish (single + bulk)
